acholi.toggle_studio_tour: Lok wot me neno ot tic
acholi.welcome_to_the_art_design_studio: 🎨 Apwoyo bino i Ot me Cal ki Yub!
acholi.explore_15_interactive_tools_that_teac: Yeny jami tic 15 ma pwonyo kit rangi, cal ma a ki i kwan namba, yub ma cwec kene, ki neno ma yot bot dano weng. Tab acel acel obedo kabedo mapat me cweyo. Man aye gin ma itwero cweyo:
acholi.explore_hsl_color_space_interactively: Yeny kabedo pa rangi HSL ki ciŋi
acholi.mix_paints_with_subtractive_color_theo: Rub rangi ki tam me rangi ma kwanyo (subtractive)
acholi.create_pixel_art_on_a_grid_canvas: Cwe cal pixel i kom grid
acholi.draw_with_rotational_reflective_symmet: Goo ki rom-rom me wir ki me lanen
acholi.mathematical_spiral_patterns_hypotroch: Cal ma wir ma a ki i kwan namba (hypotrochoids)
acholi.flow_fields_particles_starfields_auror: Kama mol, matino (particles), lakalatwe, ki aurora
acholi.virtual_spin_painting_with_physics: Goyo rangi ki wir ma lubo cik pa physics
acholi.geometric_string_patterns_on_pegs: Cal me tol ma lubo geometry i kom musumaali
acholi.optical_illusions_and_visual_tricks: Bwolo waŋ ki ryeko me neno
acholi.repeating_tile_patterns_like_m_c_esche: Cal me taelo ma dok cen jwijwi calo pa M.C. Escher
acholi.design_and_export_css_gradient_pattern: Yub ki gony cal gradient me CSS
acholi.harmony_desc: Yeny dwon ma rwatte ki ma pe rwatte, rib ratio pa frequency ki cal, dok lok wat pa wer i wat pa neno
acholi.wcag_contrast_checker_for_accessibilit: Lapim apoka rangi me WCAG pi yot me donyo
acholi.color_theory_additive_vs_subtractive_m: Tam me rangi (rubo ma medo kun rubo ma kwanyo, rangi ma orwatte, HSL/RGB), cal ma cur ma a ki i kwan namba (hypotrochoids, Lissajous), fractals ki rwatte kekengi, geometry me tessellation, neno pa wan i op art, cik me yot donyo WCAG, ki cal ma kompiuta cweyo. Jami tic weng pwonyo kwan namba ma tye i te ber-ni.
acholi.color_wheel_hsl_hsv_complementary_pair: Wiil Rangi — HSL/HSV + rangi ma orwatte
acholi.hue_0_360_around_the_wheel_saturation_: Hue (0-360 i alwora pa wiil), saturation (leŋo pa rangi), lightness (ryeny). Ma orwatte tye ngeye tuŋ ca, ma cok tye i ŋete, ma triadic poko 120°. Newton oketo rangi weng i wiil i mwaka 1666.
acholi.color_mixer_subtractive_vs_additive: Larubo Rangi — ma kwanyo kun ma medo
acholi.paint_and_print_subtractive_cmy_mixes_: Rangi ki goyo waraga = subtractive (CMY rubbe doko col); ryeny ki wang kompiuta = additive (RGB rubbe doko tar). Lobo acel-lu, ento kwan namba mapat twatwal — laloko waraga tamo i plate K, ento TV tamo i Hz.
acholi.pixel_art_bitmap_craft_at_8_8_to_32_32: Cal Pixel — tic me bitmap i 8×8 nio i 32×32
acholi.each_pixel_is_a_deliberate_decision_ne: Pixel acel acel obedo yero ma dano oketo tam iye. Sprites pa NES gikelo lakwena i 16×16 ki rangi angwen keken. Yoo pa Bresenham goyo linya ma ocur ma pe tiyo ki namba mapoto.
acholi.bilateral_mirror_rotational_n_fold_poi: Bilateral (lanen), rotational (n-fold), ki point. Kabedo 17 pa wallpaper poko kit cal weng ma dok cen i lobo lac — mano aye tic pa Escher weng.
acholi.a_small_circle_rolls_inside_a_big_one_: Circle matidi wire i i circle madit, kalam obedo mabor ki i dyere. Poka pa radius aryo miyo wel pa ture; bor pa kalam miyo dit pa cal. Gin me tuku gigengo i 1965, ento kwan namba a ki i mwaka 1700.
acholi.generative_algorithm_randomness_as_art: Cwec — algorithm + gin ma pe giŋeyo obedo lacwe cal
acholi.sol_lewitt_wrote_instructions_the_wall: Sol LeWitt ocoyo cik keken; lagoyo kor ot aye otiyo. Tin: Processing, p5.js, Cinder. “Lacwe cal obedo cik, pe adwogi.”
acholi.spin_art_centripetal_physics_in_paint: Cal me Wir — physics me centripetal i rangi
acholi.drop_paint_spin_watch_it_fling_outward: Poyo rangi, wir, dok nen kit ma ocato woko i kit ma wire. Damien Hirst onongo cente mapol ki cato cal me wir. Physics acel calo salad spinner; F = mω²r.
acholi.string_art_curves_from_straight_lines: Cal me Tol — cur ma a ki i linya ma ocur
acholi.connect_every_n_th_nail_an_envelope_cu: Rib musumaali me N acel acel; cur me envelope a woko. Mary Everest Boole okelo man i ot kwan macon i mwaka 1900. Cardioid ma a ki i linya ma ocur pud mako wang dano.
acholi.op_art_fooling_the_visual_system: Op Art — bwolo yoo me neno
acholi.bridget_riley_s_moir_fields_vasarely_s: Kama moiré pa Bridget Riley, grid pa Vasarely. Cel me neno mol i wi wan tuko matek ka apoka lokke oyot — waraga nen calo *tye ka yeŋŋe*.
acholi.every_periodic_2d_tiling_fits_one_of_1: Tiling weng me 2D ma dok cen donyo i acel i kin kabedo 17 pa rom-rom. Escher onongo man i nge cito i Alhambra i 1936; ci otiyo mwaka 30 ka tyeko kabedo meno weng.
acholi.fractal_self_similar_at_every_scale: Fractal — rwatte kene i rwom ducu
acholi.mandelbrot_1975_cauliflower_coastlines: Mandelbrot 1975. Kolifulawa, dog nam, kulo remo, mil, ki bur pa yamo i cwiny — weng gin fractal. “Pol pe gin obedo bolo, godi pe gin obedo kon, pot yat pe leŋ.”
acholi.gradient_smooth_color_transitions: Gradient — alokaloka pa rangi ma yot
acholi.css_gives_you_linear_radial_and_conic_: CSS miyo boti gradient linear, radial, ki conic. Lakalatwe me ada tye ki rangi ma pe poko (pe tye bute ma giŋeyo) — “rangi 7 pa lakalatwe” obedo yer pa Newton pi lok me wer.
acholi.stereogram_3d_from_a_flat_page: Stereogram — 3D ma a ki i waraga ma odyer
acholi.90s_magic_eye_craze_each_eye_sees_a_sl: Magic Eye onongo mako dano i mwaka 90. Waŋ acel acel neno cal ma olokke matidi; ka i lokko wangi maber, wii ribo gi doko tut. Dano pi 5% pe gitwero neno — pe bal megi.
acholi.wcag_2_1_normal_text_4_5_1_large_3_1_w: WCAG 2.1: coc matidi 4.5:1, coc madit 3:1. Pingo apoka manok balo bot jo ma wang gi pe neno maber, kadi bed in itwero kwano. APCA (ma bino i ka WCAG 3.0) tiyo ki ryeny ma wang neno, pe wel me luminance keken.
acholi.harmony_lab_hint: Pim dwon ma rwatte ki ma kwer, rib ratio pa frequency ki cal, dok lok wat pa wer i rwatte me neno.
acholi.interactive_color_wheel: Wiil rangi ma iromo tic kwede
acholi.click_the_wheel_to_pick_a_hue: Dii i wiil me yero hue
acholi.repeats_a_pattern_around_a_central_poi: dwoko cal i alwora pa kabedo me dyere. I
acholi.starfish_5_fold_snowflakes_6_fold_and_: , rec-lakalatwe (5-fold), pee (6-fold), ki ture nyuto man kabedo weng.
acholi.tile_patterns_quilts_floor_mosaics: Cal me taelo, boŋo me kom, ki mosaic me ngom ot.
acholi.snowflakes_honeycombs_islamic_star_pat: Pee, ot kic, ki cal me lakalatwe pa Islam.
acholi.mandala_art_rose_windows_in_cathedrals: Cal mandala, ki dirica ture i ot lega madongo.
acholi.islamic_geometric_art_uses_radial_symm: Cal me geometry pa Islam tiyo ki rom-rom me alwora mapol. Tol me Celtic, boŋo pa Navajo, ki cal pa kaka me Japan (“mon”) weng gilubo rom-rom me wir.
acholi.uses_bilateral_reflection_symmetry_the: tiyo ki rom-rom me lanen (bilateral) — kit ma tye i wang dano, i bulu, ki i pot yat. Man aye rom-rom ma pol loyo i kin lee.
acholi.cycles_through_the_color_spectrum_as_y: lokke i kin rangi weng ka itye ka goyo, ka dok cweyo cal mandala calo gradient pire kene.
acholi.the_quick_brown_fox_jumps_over_the_laz: Lakwena mayot obinyo wi gwok ma nino ojwiyo
acholi.sculpt_loading: Tye ka yabo jami me payo…
acholi.sculpt_failed: Payo pe otimme — tem lok ma yot loyo.
acholi.sculpt_canvas: Nen pa cal me payo 3D. Ywai me lokko.
acholi.sculpt_presets: Cak ki gin ma giyubo con
acholi.sculpt_create_ph: Onyo tit gin mo me payo…
acholi.sculpt_ai_label: Tit gin ma ipayo onyo alokaloka
acholi.sculpt_gallery_empty: Jami ma ipayo ma igwoko binen kany.
acholi.maximum_contrast_pop_art_brand_accents: Apoka madit twatwal. Pop art, ki nyig nying dul.
acholi.vibrant_but_balanced_childrens_books_c: Ryeny ento orom. Buk pa lutino, ki cal me cartoon.
acholi.rich_palette_with_two_opposing_pairs: Palette ma opoŋ ki rangi aryo aryo ma orwatte.
acholi.adjust_base_hue_saturation_lightness_v: Lok hue me acaki, saturation, alokaloka pa ryeny, wir, ki dit pa palette. Widget nyuto palette me rwatte ma tye ka wot, dok poko i kit rwatte 5. Pe tye wel, pe tye lanyut — tem tem dok nen ni rubo mene aye miyo rwatte mene.
acholi.hypothesis_free_text_no_right_answer_w: Tam ma icako kwede (coc ma tye agonya — pe tye lagam atir): Gin ango ma miyo palette bedo ma rwatte onyo ma kwer?
acholi.stuck_show_open_prompts_no_answers: 🤔 Bal — nyut lapeny ma tye agonya (pe tye lagam)
acholi.open_prompts_investigate_by_manipulati: Lapeny ma tye agonya — yeny ki temo lokko:
acholi.find_the_smallest_palette_that_still_f: Nong palette matidi loyo ma pud nen calo "otum" boti.
acholi.real_impressionists_used_analogous_pal: Lucwe cal me impressionist gitiyo ki palette analogous. Pingo gutimo meno?
acholi.some_color_schemes_have_proper_names_c: Kit rangi mogo tye ki nying megi (complementary, split-complementary, triadic). Yeny nyingi ci item cweyo gi.
acholi.high_saturation_many_colors_busy_try_d: Saturation madit + rangi mapol = koko. Tem dwoko saturation piny ki slider me rubo — gin ango ma time bot "rwatte"?
acholi.i_think_i_understand_color_harmony_now: Atamo ni doŋ aniaŋ rwatte pa rangi — wek atit ki lok na kena
acholi.explain_in_your_own_words_how_do_hue_s: Tit ki lok ni kena: poka pa hue, saturation, ki dit pa palette gimiyo "rwatte" nining?
acholi.design_note_discrete_5_state_harmony_m: Lok me yub: lanyut me rwatte tye ki kit 5 keken; wiil me SVG nyuto ka ma rangi tye iye; pe tye wel me "palette maber" — kiyubo kit meno.
acholi.the_path_traced_by_a_point_on_a_small_: — yoo ma kabedo mo i kom circle matidi goyo ka tye ka wire i i circle madit. Cal lubo
acholi.greatest_common_divisor_of_the_two_rad: (namba madit loyo ma poko radius aryo weng) pa radius aryo-ni. Ka R/r obedo poka mayot, ture doko manok; poka matek cweyo yoo ma opoŋ ki ma pe dok cen.
acholi.generative_art_canvas: Kabedo me cal ma cwec kene
acholi.click_or_drag_on_the_canvas_to_create_: 👆 Dii onyo ywai i kabedo me cweyo matino ma tuk
acholi.click_and_drag_to_drip_paint_on_the_sp: 👆 Dii ki ywai me poyo rangi i kom kabedo ma tye ka wire
acholi.in_a_spinning_reference_frame_objects_: I kabedo ma tye ka wire, jami winyo teko ma cato gi woko ma lubo bor gi ki i dyere ki wel pa yotyot me wir ma kikwano tyen aryo (ω²r).
acholi.real_spin_art_uses_centripetal_acceler: Cal me wir me ada tiyo ki centripetal acceleration me cato rangi. Rangi ma opii ringo woko oyot; rangi ma tek weko yoo macek ma dano loyo maber.
acholi.the_combination_of_rotational_motion_a: Rib pa wir ki tek pa rangi cweyo wir ki cal me interference pire kene. Cal me wir aryo pe romo bedo rom — obedo kit
acholi.string_art_controls: 🕸 Jami me loyo Cal me Tol
acholi.from_straight_lines_with_a_circle_and_: ki i linya ma ocur. Ki circle ki lanyai 2, inongo
acholi.the_heart_shaped_curve_seen_in_coffee_: — cur ma kit calo cwiny, ma inen i kikopo kawa. Lanyai 3 cweyo
acholi.higher_multipliers_create_intricate_pa: . Lanyai madongo cweyo cal ma opoŋ ma lubo
acholi.nail_n_connects_to_nail_n_m_mod_total: : musumaali N ribbe ki musumaali (N × M) mod ducu.
acholi.optical_art_emerged_in_the_1960s_pione: (Optical Art) oa malo i mwaka 1960, ma gukwongo kwede aye
acholi.it_exploits_the_mechanics_of_human_vis: . Tiyo ki kit ma wang dano neno kwede me cweyo bwola me mol, yeŋŋe, ki tut i kom waraga ma odyer.
acholi.appear_when_two_regular_grids_overlap_: nen ka grid aryo gucung i wi kengi ki apoka matidi. Wii pe romo poko cal aryo ma pyem, ci cweyo cur ki apiny ma pe tye ada. Teko acel-lu aye miyo boŋo mogo nen calo tye ka ryeny.
acholi.occur_when_highly_saturated_complement: timme ka rangi ma orwatte ma saturation gi tek gicung i ŋet kengi. Jami me neno rangi i wangi pyem, ka cweyo dog ma pe cung atir — man kilwoŋo
acholi.in_the_retina_are_the_main_perceptual_: i retina gin aye yoo madongo me neno. Cal me alwora ma cok cok miyo wang lokke ma pe dano mito, ci cal nen calo tye ka yweyo ki gwir.
acholi.or_tiling_covers_a_plane_with_shapes_t: (onyo tiling) umo lobo lac ki kit ma rwatte kekengi ma pe weko bur onyo cung i wi kengi. Kit adek keken pa polygon ma romo umo lobo kengi:
acholi.1898_1972_transformed_simple_tilings_i: (1898–1972) olokko tiling mayot odoko cal ki ŋolo bute pa taelo. Kit tic mere: lok bute acel pa kit ci ikob alokaloka meno i bute ma tye ngeye, wek taelo pud rwatte kekengi maber. Man aye te
acholi.uses_tessellations_extensively_combini: tiyo ki tessellation mapol — ka rib lakalatwe, hexagon, ki cal ma opoŋo kengi ma inen i ot lega calo Alhambra. Cal magi lubo cik pa kwan namba matek, ento gin ber twatwal me neno.
acholi.tessellations_use_three_key_operations: Tessellation tiyo ki yoo adek madongo —
acholi.flip_every_tessellation_can_be_classif: (loko ka). Tessellation ducu kiromo keto i acel i kin 'kabedo 17 pa wallpaper'.
acholi.click_tiles_to_cycle_their_colors: 👆 Dii taelo me loko rangi gi
acholi.is_generated_by_iterating_z_z_c_for_ev: kicweyo ki nwoyo z = z² + c pi kabedo c weng i lobo pa namba complex. Kabedo ma |z| pe kato (pe kato 2) tye 'i iye' pa set. Dog te nyuto
acholi.use_the_same_formula_but_fix_c_and_var: tiyo ki formula acel-lu ento gimako c ci gilokko z me acaki. Kabedo acel acel me Mandelbrot cweyo Julia set mapat. Kabedo ma tye i iye pa Mandelbrot cweyo Julia ma orib; ma tye woko cweyo 'Fatou sets' ma calo apwa.
acholi.fractal_modifies_the_iteration_to_z_re: fractal loko nwoyo doko z = (|Re(z)| + i|Im(z)|)² + c, ci cweyo kit ma pe rom ma calo mel ma waŋ. Michael Michelitsch ki Otto Rössler aye gunongo i 1992.
acholi.is_built_by_the_chaos_game_pick_a_rand: kigedo ki 'tuku me akeka': yer kabedo mo, ka inwo ka nwoyo cwalo nucu pa yoo cito i wic mo ma iyero ma pe iŋeyo. Ma lworo, tic ma pe kiŋeyo man cweyo fractal ma rwatte kene atir.
acholi.1924_2010_coined_the_word_fractal_from: (1924–2010) aye ocako nyiŋ 'fractal' ki i leb Latin 'fractus' (ma oturre). Onyuto ni dog nam, godi, kulo remo, ki wil me cente weng gin tye ki geometry me fractal —
acholi.double_click_to_zoom_in_scroll_wheel_t: 👆 Dii tyen aryo me dongo • Wiil me scroll me dongo/dwoko piny
acholi.screens_create_gradients_by_mixing: 🌈 Wang kompiuta cweyo gradient ki rubo
acholi.each_pixel_blends_red_green_and_blue_l: . Pixel acel acel rubo ryeny makwar, matar-bar, ki mabulu ki teko mapat. Gradient loko wel magi mot mot i kabedo.
acholi.produces_more_perceptually_uniform_gra: cweyo gradient ma rom maber i wang dano loyo RGB. Cito ki i makwar nio i mabulu i RGB kato i buru ma pe leŋ; ento i HSL, kato i rangi ma potpot ma ryeny — kit ma lacwe cal rubo kwede.
acholi.are_everywhere_sunsets_rayleigh_scatte: tye kabedo weng: ceng poto (Rayleigh scattering poko bor pa apiny), lakalatwe (kero pa ryeny poko ki frequency), ki tut pa nam (pii mwonyo makwar mukwongo, ci doŋ odoŋ mabulu matut).
acholi.sweep_color_around_a_center_point_like: cato rangi i alwora pa dyere calo wiil rangi. Kitiyo kwede i chart me pie, i lanyut me kuro, ki i nyuto data. CSS okelo conic-gradient i mwaka 2020 keken!
acholi.use_gradients_to_create_depth_direct_a: gitiyo ki gradient me cweyo tut, me tero neno, ki me kelo winyo i cwiny. Gradient ma a ki i lyet cito i ŋic nyuto tut (atmospheric perspective); ma a ki i ryeny cito i col nyuto dit (chiaroscuro).
acholi.describe_an_object_for_a_depth_map_or_: Tit gin mo pi map me tut onyo tit kit mo pi cal...
acholi.generate_ai_depth_map: Cwe Map me Tut ki AI
acholi.generate_ai_pattern_tile: Cwe Taelo me Cal ki AI
acholi.generate_ai_base_tile: 🎨 Cwe Taelo me Acaki ki AI
acholi.white_pops_out_gray_middle_black_far: Tar = donyo woko • Buru = i dyere • Col = mabor
acholi.save_depth_map_png: Gwok Map me Tut macalo PNG
acholi.save_depth_map_png_2: ⬇️ Gwok Map me Tut macalo PNG
acholi.so_each_sees_the_world_from_a_slightly: , pi meno waŋ acel acel neno lobo ki anguc ma opat manok. Wii ribo nen aryo-ni wek inen
acholi.magic_eye_images_hide_3d_shapes_in_a_r: (cal me Magic Eye™) kano kit 3D i cal ma dok cen jwijwi. Ryeko-ni: ka gin ma opondo tye 'cok,' cal dok cen ki
acholi.where_it_s_far_the_period_is_longer_yo: ; ka tye 'mabor,' kin bedo mabor. Wii kwano apoka pa kin-ni macalo tut.
acholi.1993_94_by_tom_baccei_and_cheri_smith_: (1993–94) ma Tom Baccei ki Cheri Smith gucoyo gucato copy makato milion 25 i wi lobo weng. Dr. Christopher Tyler aye okwongo tic me autostereogram i mwaka 1979.
acholi.to_see_the_image_hold_your_face_close_: 🧠 Me neno cal: ket waŋi cok ki wang kompiuta, wek wangi kwe calo itye ka neno 'kato' i cal cito i kor ot ma mabor, ka doŋ dwok cen mot mot. Kit 3D bi 'donyo' woko. Man kilwoŋo
acholi.have_difficulty_seeing_stereograms_due: gitye ki peko me neno stereogram pi two calo amblyopia (waŋ ma nwoyo), strabismus (waŋ ma ocil), onyo apoka mukene i neno ki wang aryo. Man pe rac ata!
acholi.relax_your_eyes_and_look_through_the_i: Wek wangi kwe ci nen 'kato' i cal wek inen 3D
acholi.hold_your_face_close_to_the_screen: Ket waŋi cok ki wang kompiuta
acholi.relax_your_eyes_try_to_look_through_th: Wek wangi kwe — tem neno 'kato' i cal cito i kor ot ma tye ngeye
acholi.slowly_move_back_a_3d_shape_will_emerg: Dwok cen mot mot. Kit 3D bia woko!
acholi.tip_the_two_guide_dots_above_should_ap: Tam: kabedo aryo ma i wiye malo myero nen calo adek ka wangi ocung maber
acholi.create_animated_3d_stereograms_from_pr: Cwe stereogram 3D ma kwo ki i jami ma giyubo con, cal ma igoyo, cal ma icwalo, transform, onyo map me tut ma AI ocweyo!
acholi.animation_source: 📡 Ka ma kwo a ki iye
acholi.draw_a_depth_map_capture_it_as_a_keyfr: Goo map me tut, gwoke macalo keyframe, ka doŋ igo mukene. Kwo bi ribo gi kikome.
acholi.export_depth_map_gif: Gony Map me Tut macalo GIF
acholi.upload_depth_map_image: 📂 Cwal Cal me Map pa Tut
acholi.upload_a_grayscale_image_white_near_bl: Cwal cal ma buru (tar = cok, col = bor). Kibimiyo kwo ki transform ma iyero.
acholi.upload_depth_map_image_2: Cwal cal me map pa tut
acholi.animates_the_depth_map_from_the_static: Miyo kwo bot map me tut ma a ki i tab me 'Ma cuŋ' ki transform ma iyero. Cit i yoo me 'Ma cuŋ' mukwongo me goyo map ni.
acholi.tip_draw_a_depth_map_in_the_static_tab: 💡 Tam: Go map me tut i tab me 'Ma cuŋ' mukwongo, ka idwog kany me miyo kwo bote ki transform.
acholi.ai_generated_depth_map: 🤖 Map me Tut ma AI Ocweyo
acholi.describe_a_3d_scene_and_ai_will_genera: Tit cal 3D mo ci AI bicweyo map me tut, ka bimiyo kwo bote ki transform.
acholi.e_g_a_glowing_crystal_orb_floating_in_: labolle: Bolo me crystal ma ryeny ma pyem i polo...
acholi.generate_ai_depth_map_for_animation: Cwe Map me Tut ki AI pi kwo
acholi.ai_depth_map_ready: ✅ Map me tut pa AI otyeko!
acholi.ai_motion_calls_gemini_to_plan_poses_t: Mol me AI lwoŋo Gemini me yubo kit cuŋ, ci Imagen cweyo frame acel acel macalo map me tut mere. Kanyo ~5–7s pi frame acel; pe kato kare pa rate-limit.
acholi.ai_image_generation_is_not_available_u: ⚠️ Cweyo cal ki AI pe tye tin. Tii ki yoo me Preset, Goo, Cwal, onyo Lok.
acholi.relax_your_eyes_and_look_through_the_a: Wek wangi kwe ci nen 'kato' i kwo-ni wek inen kit 3D ka mol
acholi.lock_your_eyes_into_the_3d_view_before: Mak wangi i nen me 3D mukwongo ma peya idio Play
acholi.slower_speeds_4_6_fps_are_easier_to_ma: Yotyot ma mot (4–6 FPS) yot me mako neno
acholi.pulse_and_heart_presets_are_the_easies: Preset me Gwir ki Cwiny gin aye yot loyo me neno ka gitye ka mol
acholi.the_exported_gif_can_be_printed_frame_: GIF ma igonyo kiromo goyo i waraga frame ki frame macalo buk me cal ma mol!
